description: Remove Next.js dev toolbar logo and set up environment. Disable devIndicators in next.config.ts.
steps: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/ChronAI/frontend && npm install` to ensure dependencies are installed
Edit `frontend/next.config.ts` to add `devIndicators: false` (or `devIndicators: { appIsrStatus: false, buildActivity: false }`) to suppress the Next.js logo in the bottom left corner
Run `npm run build` to verify the config change does not break the build
acceptance_criteria: next.config.ts includes devIndicators configuration to disable the Next.js logo
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/ChronAI/frontend && npm install && npm run build
